IBSS Winter School Holidays 2026

Two Weeks of Adventure

Ten outings across two weeks. Tap + ADD on any day, or hit INFO for the details and goals. Then book in one go.

⌚ ALL ACTIVITIES 09:00–15:00 ⌖ PICKUP FROM HOME (FLEXIBLE)

Costs to note

Lunch is provided most days ($15–$20). Some days have an extra cost: swimming $6, 123 Boom $50, and Bounce Day entry from $25 (food trucks on site for lunch). Teens are always welcome to bring a packed lunch if they'd prefer. For Movie World and Sea World, if your teen doesn't have a pass, single-day tickets are roughly $105–$119 (cheaper online). Companion Card holders get a free companion ticket; Carer's Card holders a discounted rate — bring your card.
